10/24 The guest called to change her service from a lash lift to a full set. The guest mentioned that she had clusters from a different salon and in the process the guest ripped off some her natural lashes. I asked for a second opinion from her artist (Hiba) to see what would be best. The artist reccomended it would be best she not get a full set because that would be adding more stress to her lash extensions since she ripped off some of her natural lashes but if the guest wanted to get serviced for today we could do a lash lift and reccomend the advanced after care serum but even then that would be a lot for her natural lashes because she ripped some her natural lashes. The artist suggested we recommend the guest to give her eyelashes a break and after two weeks if she would like to schedule an appointment we can.-BM
